Patient Name: John Doe
Date: 2026-06-15
Hospital: Metro Health Labs

COMPLETE BLOOD COUNT (CBC)
Hemoglobin: 14.2 g/dL (Normal Range: 13.5 - 17.5)
White Blood Cells (WBC): 6.8 x10^3/uL (Normal Range: 4.5 - 11.0)
Platelets: 250 x10^3/uL (Normal Range: 150 - 450)

LIPID PANEL
Total Cholesterol: 215 mg/dL (Normal Range: 100 - 200)
HDL Cholesterol: 45 mg/dL (Normal Range: > 40)
LDL Cholesterol: 135 mg/dL (Normal Range: < 100)
Triglycerides: 175 mg/dL (Normal Range: < 150)
